name: Onboarding language-setup error 'Cancel' ignores returnTo=settings
description: [FCR 2026-06-21 · L6-09] error-state Cancel routes to Home unconditionally, mis-routing settings-originated users (handleBack honors returnTo). Fix: honor returnTo.
acceptanceCriteria: Root cause: the language-setup error-state Cancel button hard-codes goBackOrReplace(router, /(app)/home) while handleBack and successful settings re-entry honor returnTo=settings by routing to /(app)/more. Variants: (1) returnTo=settings error cancel routes back to More/settings; (2) default onboarding error cancel still routes Home. Regression test: apps/mobile/src/app/(app)/onboarding/language-setup.test.tsx covers both variants, fails without the fix, and passes when the error Cancel path shares the same returnTo handling as handleBack.
